---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references/works.bib
nocite: '@*'
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/science
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](Images/^11.jpg)
![](Images/^12.jpg)
![](Images/^22.jpg)
![](Images/^23.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](Images/^13.jpg)
![](Images/^14.jpg)
![](Images/^24.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](Images/^15.jpg)
![](Images/^16.jpg)
![](Images/^26.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](Images/^17.jpg)
![](Images/^18.jpg)
![](Images/^25.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![](Images/^19.jpg)
![](Images/^20.jpg)
![](Images/^21.jpg)
![](Images/^27.jpg)
:::

:::


<style>

/* Improve spacing between publications */
.csl-entry {
  margin-bottom: 1.3em;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* Slightly smaller journal text */
.csl-entry i {
  font-size: 0.95em;
}

/* Style links (DOI, PDF etc.) */
.csl-entry a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.csl-entry a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Limit width for better readability */
main {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

</style>

## Journal Articles

::: {.nocite}
@*
:::
